'''Pernella''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Pernella system/Legends|Pernella system]] in [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. It was one of the [[Freeworlds Territory|Freeworlds]]. It was also one of the [[Three Ellas]], with a liberal government looser about crime and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] than most Tapani worlds.<ref name="LE" />

{{Planet-stub}}
